jobs.title: Web Developer

aiScore.matchReason: The candidate demonstrates a comprehensive skill set in core web development technologies like JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Node.js, and responsive design, perfectly aligning with the Web Developer role and experience level.
aiScore.learningTip: Explore a popular frontend framework like React.js or Vue.js to build dynamic user interfaces.

tips: Add GitHub link at the top of resume – recruiters WILL check it
List tech stack per project: "Built with React.js, Node.js, MongoDB"
Use numbers: "Reduced load time by 30%" not "Improved performance"
Add a "Technical Skills" dedicated section above experience

jobs.coverLetterPreview:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Web Developer position at Inboundsys Webgalaxy. As a B.Tech graduate in Electronics and Communication Engineering (2025), I possess a strong foundation in JavaScript, Python, HTML5 and a genuine passion for building impactful software solutions.

During my academic journey, I developed the "Personal Portfolio Website" — Responsive portfolio website with dark/light theme toggle, typing animation, and 6+ completed projects. Improved mobile compatibility by 50%.. This project sharpened my ability to design, build, and deploy production-ready applications independently.

I am a fast learner, highly motivated, and eager to contribute meaningfully to your team. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills align with your requirements.

Warm regards,
Rohit Kumar Singh

aiScore.matchReason: The candidate possesses strong foundational and advanced web development skills, including frontend (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, responsive design) and backend (Node.js, SQL/MySQL), perfectly aligning with the Web Developer role and experience level.
aiScore.learningTip: Master a popular frontend framework like React or Vue.js and gain proficiency in version control systems like Git.

tips: Add GitHub link at the top of resume – recruiters WILL check it
List tech stack per project: "Built with React.js, Node.js, MongoDB"
Use numbers: "Reduced load time by 30%" not "Improved performance"
Add a "Technical Skills" dedicated section above experience

aiScore.matchReason: The candidate possesses strong foundational JavaScript, frontend development skills (HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap), and Node.js, aligning exceptionally well with a Fresher Full-Stack JavaScript Developer role.
aiScore.learningTip: Focus on mastering a popular frontend JavaScript framework like React or Vue.js, and explore Express.js for backend development to complete the full-stack profile.

tips: Add GitHub link at the top of resume – recruiters WILL check it

Mention SQL proficiency level: "Advanced SQL – CTEs, Window Functions"

todaysTips: Add IT Skills section with all tech stack: recruiter keyword filters look here
Keep your "Last Active" status fresh – log in daily or set to "Active"
Upload a professional photo – profiles with photos get 4x more views
Add all 10–15 key skills in the skills section, not just 3–5
Mention internships, academic projects, personal projects as "Work Experience"
todaysSignals: Follow companies you wish to join – Naukri shows your interest to their HRs
Change your resume title slightly and re-upload to refresh resume activity
Search for jobs daily – Naukri tracks "active seekers" and shows them first

todaysActions.text: Skills reorder karo — "JavaScript" ko #1 pe le jao
Headline update karo — ek trending keyword add karo
Resume re-upload karo (aaj ki date ke saath)
"Software developer fresher" search karo Naukri pe (activity signal)
5 matching jobs save karo — recruiter visibility badhti hai

skillGapSummary.resource: Learn REST API – search on YouTube
